title: Councillors to serve on GRDM
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Bitou will have two...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Bitou will have two new representatives on the Garden Route District Municipality (GRDM), following a special council meeting held in Plettenberg Bay on 4 July.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Bitou will have two new representatives on the Garden Route District Municipality (GRDM), following a special council meeting held in Plettenberg Bay on 4 July."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bitou DA councillor Dave Swart will be replacing DA representative Nompumelelo Ndayi, a proportional representative councillor, who will take up a permanent DA seat, following the election of former GRDM mayor, Memory Booysen, as a Member of the Provincial Legislature.","html":"Bitou DA councillor Dave Swart will be replacing DA representative Nompumelelo Ndayi, a proportional representative councillor, who will take up a permanent DA seat, following the election of former GRDM mayor, Memory Booysen, as a Member of the Provincial Legislature."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"ANC Chief Whip and Bitou ward 5 councillor Samkele Mangxaba is the second Bitou councillor to serve on the GRDM. He takes the place of ward 6 councillor Nokuthula Seti of the ANC who has been appointed Bitou's Municipal Public Accounts Committee (MPAC) chairperson."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ndayi served on the Bitou council from 2012. Previously, she was part of the mayoral committee and had been seconded to the GRDM a number of times since 2016.","html":"Ndayi served on the Bitou council from 2012. Previously, she was part of the mayoral committee and had been seconded to the GRDM a number of times since 2016."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Speaker Sandiso Gcabayi wished her well and said: \"She was vibrant in council and rooted in the community and during my time as speaker there were no negative reports that I have received about her.","html":"Speaker Sandiso Gcabayi wished her well and said: \"She was vibrant in council and rooted in the community and during my time as speaker there were no negative reports that I have received about her."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We are proud of her as she is one of our own.\"","html":"\"We are proud of her as she is one of our own.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ndayi said the decision to leave Bitou \"is an exciting one\", and she would \"miss my former colleagues\".","html":"Ndayi said the decision to leave Bitou \"is an exciting one\", and she would \"miss my former colleagues\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Bitou council was and will always be vibrant and a space of contestation of ideas. I will miss my colleagues sorely and some members of the opposition,\" she said.","html":"\"Bitou council was and will always be vibrant and a space of contestation of ideas. I will miss my colleagues sorely and some members of the opposition,\" she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
